reason: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 installation-time kernel flag can enable FIPS mode when booted with fips=1. Without this flag, FIPS mode is not enabled on preexisting systems, leading to a permanent finding.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; FIPS mode not enabled; Missing fips=1 kernel boot parameter; /etc/dracut.conf.d/40-fips.conf missing add_dracutmodules+= fips
